subject: Revert "[SDNC/CCSDK] Guilin version bump"
commit_message:
Revert "[SDNC/CCSDK] Guilin version bump"

Revert submission 113061-change-112626-6

Reason for revert: e2e tests are broken by Guilin SDNC versions

I8d660a8e3:[SDNC/CCSDK] Guilin version bump
Ide8b60615:[CCSDK/CDS] Bump CDS charts to Guilin version

Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

Patch Set 1:

VNF-AFI was deprecated in Frankfurt and removed in Guilin. This was communicated to the onap-discuss mailing list and documented in our Frankfurt release notes, and was also reviewed at our Guilin architecture review.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> VNF-AFI was deprecated in Frankfurt and removed in Guilin. This was communicated to the onap-discuss mailing list and documented in our Frankfurt release notes, and was also reviewed at our Guilin architecture review.

ok clear
so it is normal that some tests were failing, they must be deprecated and replaced
but as far as I remember it should not be the case of pnf-registrate which is based on GR-API

@K.Kuzmicki could you have a look at https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/gating/112626-6/xtesting-smoke-usecases-robot/pnf-registrate/pnf-registrate/report.html
Does this test need some update too?
